headline: Elon Musk's mom at JPMorgan event: 'I have a genius son'
summary: SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) founder, chairman, and CEO Elon Musk sat down with JPMorgan (JPM) CEO Jamie Dimon on Thursday. At the event, Musk's mother surprised him with an appearance. Watch the video above to hear her remarks about her son.

headline: Why The FLSmidth (CPSE:FLS) Story Is Shifting As Pump Strength Meets Valuation Doubts
summary: FLSmidth’s fair value estimate in the updated model moves from DKK 566.36 to DKK 583.33, while JPMorgan’s separate decision to cut its price target by DKK 40 shows that views on upside potential are not aligned. The cluster of higher targets in the DKK 545 to DKK 600 range reflects growing confidence among bullish analysts, set against more cautious voices questioning how far the re rating can run. Read on to see what is driving these shifts and how you can follow the evolving narrative...

headline: Banks Are Paying Again: 5 Financial Dividend Stocks After the Stress Tests
summary: The Federal Reserve’s asset cap on Wells Fargo came off in 2025. JPMorgan’s board waved through a $50 billion repurchase authorization. Bank of America returned $9.30 billion to shareholders in a single quarter. The post-stress-test capital return cycle is already running, and the cash is being shoveled out the door faster than most retail investors ... Banks Are Paying Again: 5 Financial Dividend Stocks After the Stress Tests
